title: Model Library overlay
description: Move model manager from slide-over into a full-page MpiOverlay (body mode, X close), titled 'Model Library', with a grid of model cards. Add Image/Video filters (derived from supportedOps prefixes) alongside the existing L/B/H tier filters. Slide-over keeps settings/hotkeys/queue unchanged. Reuse MpiModelManager + MpiInstalledDisplay; only shell.js models:open routing + MpiModelManager heading/filters/grid CSS change. New surface -> re-read docs/redesign/PRODUCT.md + DESIGN.md before styling.
